contact_nok.relationship: no next of kin present tonight

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Lightning keeps shooting down my leg, and I can't even stand up to get to the bathroom. I've had back and disc trouble before but this flare is the worst it's ever been and the usual painkillers aren't touching it.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It suddenly got much worse over the last two days and I can't walk or sleep. I live on my own so I'm scared I'll fall trying to get to the toilet tonight.

symptom_narrative.onset: it flared up out of nowhere and the last two days have been by far the worst
symptom_narrative.duration: about 48 hours of this severe flare, on top of back trouble I've had for years
symptom_narrative.character: electric, shooting, burning pain that runs down my leg like lightning
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst it's ever been, I honestly can't stand or put weight on it
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: starts in my lower back and shoots all the way down one leg
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: pretty much constant and it keeps waking me up all night
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really seems to help, the usual tablets aren't doing anything
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: trying to stand up or put any weight on the leg
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had a slipped disc and back flare-ups before, but never anything like this
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't get out of bed to reach the toilet and I haven't slept

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a slipped disc / disc problem in my lower back
past_medical_history.how_managed: physio and painkillers when it flares

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: anti-inflammatory tablets (ibuprofen), took the maximum on the packet
paracetamol, also at the maximum dose

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone with no one there tonight; there are things on the floor between the bed and bathroom and he's worried about falling
